abilities.name: oblivious
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents infatuation and protects against Captivate.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be infatuated and is immune to Captivate. If a Pokémon is infatuated and acquires this ability, its infatuation is cleared.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated, falling for taunts, or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: own-tempo
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be confused. If a Pokémon is confused and acquires this ability, its confusion will immediately be healed.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon sticks to its own tempo, preventing it from becoming confused or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: regenerator
abilities.shortEffect: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon regains 1/3 of its maximum HP when it is switched out for another Pokémon under any circumstances other than having fainted. This ability does not take effect when a battle ends.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon has a little of its HP restored when withdrawn from battle.
